  • Constructor Details

    • FreeFormatNumericField

      public FreeFormatNumericField(int length, boolean signed)

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      public BigDecimal getValue()
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Retrieves the value represented by this instance as a BigDecimal. The value is derived from the memory representation, and if the instance supports a specific number of decimals, the value is scaled accordingly.
      Overrides:
      getValue in class NZoned
      Returns:
      the value of this instance as a BigDecimal, potentially scaled based on the configured decimal places

    • setValue

      public void setValue(double value)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Sets the value of this instance using the specified double value. The provided double value is converted to a BigDecimal, scaled to the number of decimal places defined by this instance, and rounded using HALF_DOWN rounding mode before being set.
      Overrides:
      setValue in class AbstractNDecimal
      Parameters:
      value - the double value to set for this instance

    • setValue

      public void setValue(BigDecimal value)
      Description copied from class: AbstractNDecimal
      Sets the value of this instance, applying a scale transformation and rounding. The provided BigDecimal value is multiplied by the scale factor represented by pow, rounded using HALF_DOWN mode, and then converted to a long. The resulting value is written to memory.
      Overrides:
      setValue in class NZoned
      Parameters:
      value - the BigDecimal value to set for this instance
